title: More Items
description: A mod that add's various items/blocks such as tiered storage, extra armor/tools, upgradable machines, ultimate ∞ items, and more! There are many items added to the game to ensure a QOL start and end game!
body:
A mod that add's various items/blocks such as tiered storage, extra armor/tools, upgradable machines, ultimate ∞ items, and more! There are many items added to the game to ensure a QOL start and end game!


ACTIVE VERSIONS:

1.20.1 Forge/NeoForge/Fabric

OTHER MOD COMPATIBILITY:

[Forge/NeoForge/Fabric] - REQUIRED [Architechury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

[Fabric] REQUIRED - [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)

[Forge/Fabric] Optional - [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

[Forge/NeoForge] Optional - [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)

[Forge/NeoForge] Optional - [Project E](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projecte)

[Forge/NeoForge] Optional - [The One Probe](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-one-probe)

[Forge/NeoForge/Fabric] Optional - [Jade🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)

[Fabric] Optional - [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)


Feel free to use this mod in your mod pack!!
